title: Stacksmith Run File
description: Defines a reproducible Stacksmith invocation with layered stack, config, and variable inputs.

source.description: Reference source type for local files.

path.description: Local filesystem path to the referenced runfile resource.

source.description: Reference source type for Git-hosted files.

repo.description: Git repository URL for the referenced runfile resource.

path.description: Path inside the Git repository to the referenced runfile resource.

ref.description: Git ref, branch, or tag used to resolve the reference.

source.description: Reference source type for HTTP(S) URLs.

url.description: HTTP or HTTPS URL for the referenced resource.

merge_mode.description: Merge strategy for layered stacks, configs, and vars. Defaults to `deep`.

stacks.description: Ordered stack definition references to deep-merge for single-stack commands, or explicit stack targets for run-all.

configs.description: Ordered tool configuration references. Later layers override earlier scalar values while dicts merge recursively and lists append.

vars.description: Ordered vars-file references applied before CLI-provided vars layers.

var.description: Inline variable values applied before CLI-provided vars layers. Values may use any YAML-supported type.
